arts.ttl: Juventus vs. Inter is always a huge clash
arts.sum: Juventus are the only team unbeaten in home games in Serie A this season (W5 D7); however, they have drawn the joint-most home matches in the Big-5 European leagues in 2024/25: seven, level with Getafe. Juventus are unbeaten in 10 of their last 11 home league games against Inter (W7 D3), with the Nerazzurri`s only win in the period at the Allianz Stadium in Serie A arriving on 3rd April 2022 (0-1 via Hakan Çalhanoglu’s penalty).
